arguments.command:
# Use dynamic symbols to resolve addresses
# The offsets from the tombstone
OFFSETS="0x222098 0x2241ac 0x1abc80 0x1abd14 0x16dfa4 0x16db6c 0x16de04"

# Get sorted dynamic symbol table with addresses
nm -D --defined-only /tmp/libmonosgen-2.0.so 2>/dev/null | sort > /tmp/mono_syms.txt
echo "=== Sample symbols ==="
head -20 /tmp/mono_syms.txt

echo ""
echo "=== Resolving each offset against dynamic symbols ==="
for offset in $OFFSETS; do
    # Find the last symbol whose address is <= the offset
    decimal_offset=$((offset))
    hex_offset=$(printf "%016x" $decimal_offset)
    match=$(awk -v addr="$hex_offset" '$1 <= addr { last=$0 } END { print last }' /tmp/mono_syms.txt)
    if [ -n "$match" ]; then
        sym_addr=$(echo "$match" | awk '{print $1}')
        sym_name=$(echo "$match" | awk '{print $3}')
        sym_dec=$((16#$sym_addr))
        diff=$((decimal_offset - sym_dec))
        printf "  %s => %s+0x%x\n" "$offset" "$sym_name" "$diff"
    else
        printf "  %s => (no match)\n" "$offset"
    fi
done
